'''Loader Droids''' were used in [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] fought a Loader Droid while trying to escape the [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']].

==Behind the scenes==
A Loader Droid appears in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]''. It serves as a mid-level boss in the game's first mission.
